hero.title:
Fire safety.
Engineered right.
hero.subtitle: Accepting projects — Q2 / Q3 2026
hero.description: We design, inspect and commission fire suppression systems for pharma, aerospace and heavy industry — across Belgium, Germany and France.

stats.label: Sprinkler suppression success rate — 100+ years of field data
Sprinkler heads engineered — GSK RX395 alone

services.sectionSubtitle: From first feasibility to final sign-off.

services.title: Conceptual design & feasibility
services.description: Risk analysis, water supply study, BOQ and tender-ready documentation — aligned to your authority's codes from day one.

services.title: Detailed 2D & 3D design
services.description: Coordinated drawing sets in AutoCAD, Revit and SprinkCAD — wet, dry, pre-action and deluge — with hydraulic calculations to NFPA 13.

services.title: Independent inspections & audits
services.description: Third-party assessments against NFPA, FM Global, NBN EN, CEA 4001 and ANPI — with clear, prioritised remediation paths.

services.title: Site follow-up & commissioning
services.description: We manage subcontractors, witness tests and hand over a fully documented, code-compliant system.

references.sectionSubtitle: GSK. Takeda. Belgian Air Force. Cargill. Full dossier available on request.

projects.title: GSK RX395 — Fire Sprinkler System
projects.description: 2,000+ heads across 11 alarm valve systems — wet and pre-action double interlock — in an active GMP environment.
projects.subtitle: Pharma / GMP · Belgium · 2024

projects.title: Belgian Air Force — Zutendaal
projects.description: New pump house, 5 km of underground piping, 17 warehouses. Full site follow-up and commissioning sign-off.
projects.subtitle: Defence · Belgium · 2023

references.title: GSK RX395 — Fire Sprinkler System
references.description: Feasibility, conceptual design, BOQ and full 2D/3D design of 11 alarm valve systems — wet and pre-action double interlock.
references.subtitle: Pharma / GMP · Belgium · 2024

references.title: GSK WN26 — Fire Remediation
references.description: Protection of GMP production zones, clean rooms and building envelope. Wet, deluge and pre-action double interlock systems.
references.subtitle: Pharma / GMP · Belgium · 2023

references.title: Belgian Air Force — Zutendaal
references.description: New pump house, water tanks, 5 km underground piping, 17 warehouses, workshop, office and medical storage. Full commissioning.
references.subtitle: Defence · Belgium · 2023

references.title: Takeda Lessines — Plant Extension
references.description: Pre-action sprinkler design for a biologics production expansion — full hydraulic model and alarm-valve coordination.
references.subtitle: Pharma / GMP · Belgium · 2022

references.title: Cargill Ghent — Warehouse Retrofit
references.description: FM Global-compliant retrofit of high-pile storage sprinklers across 18,000 m² of active logistics floorplate.
references.subtitle: Logistics / FM Global · Belgium · 2022

standards.sectionSubtitle: Prepared against the standard your AHJ requires — not a generic template.

standards.title: NFPA 13
standards.subtitle: Sprinkler Systems
standards.description: US and international reference standard for sprinkler installation design.

standards.title: FM Global
standards.subtitle: Property Loss Prevention
standards.description: Insurance-driven datasheets for high-value and high-hazard occupancies.

standards.title: NBN EN 12845
standards.subtitle: European Sprinkler Standard
standards.description: Principal European standard for automatic sprinkler system design and installation.

standards.title: CEA 4001
standards.subtitle: European Insurance Framework
standards.description: Sprinkler installation specification for European insurance acceptance.

standards.title: ANPI
standards.subtitle: Belgian Certification Body
standards.description: Belgium's approved fire safety inspection authority.

standards.title: Royal Decree 28/03/2014
standards.subtitle: Belgian Workplace Legislation
standards.description: Federal fire prevention legislation for Belgian workplaces.

standards.title: EN 54
standards.subtitle: Detection & Alarm
standards.description: European standard for fire detection and alarm systems.

standards.title: Zone Brabant Wallon
standards.subtitle: Local AHJ
standards.description: We align with local fire services before submission — not after.
